---
title: "Laboratorio di Chimica Agraria (S13)"
---

::: {style="font-size:18px;"}

___"Mai dire Mais 🌽"___ [semi cit.]

:::

::: {.callout-note}

::: {style="font-size:18px;"}
**Responsabili Laboratorio**:

- 👨🏻‍💼 Prof. Zeno Varanini - [email](mailto:zeno.varanini@univr.it)

- 👩🏻‍💼 Prof.sa Anita Zamboni - [email](mailto:anita.zamboni@univr.it)

<!-- **Laboratory Technician**: Fabio Valentinuzzi - [email](mailto:fabio.valentinuzzi@unibz.it) [phone](tel:+39 0471017627)  -->

Per qualsiasi aggiornamento o info, scrivimi! --> [Mauro](mailto:mauro.maver@univr.it?subject=[Update]%20Storage%20e%20Lab)

:::

:::

::: {.callout-important}

::: {style="font-size:18px;"}

🆘 In caso di emergenza chiamare --> XXXX o YYYY
<!-- Call [112](tel:112) in case of Emergency -->

:::

:::



::: {style="font-size:20px;"}

:::
